title: BEM-548 Claude approval sync
objective:

"""
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM548_NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_FOR_APPROVAL.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')

# Check Telegram outbox technical readiness. Claude said not to wait for hourly run.
outbox_ready = False
outbox_matches = []
if outbox.exists():
    line_no = 0
    for line in outbox.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        line_no += 1
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        st = rec.get('status')
        if st in ['ready_to_send','queued_for_sender','queued']:
            outbox_ready = True
            outbox_matches.append({'line': line_no, 'cycle_id': rec.get('cycle_id'), 'status': st})

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-548 | Next Development Roadmap Approved by Claude

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 14:51 (UTC+3)

## Статус аудита
Claude одобрил BEM-548 с двумя правками:
1. BEM-546 не ждать: если outbox имеет `ready_to_send`/`queued_for_sender`, technical wiring считается завершённым; live proof появится на первом hourly run.
2. Full regression разделить на два этапа: 5a synthetic и 5b live.

## Архитектурное правило
Внешний контур пишет только куратору. Куратор валидирует вход, передаёт в role-orchestrator, оркестратор назначает роли, provider-adapter выбирает провайдера только после provider probe.

## Roadmap — 7 этапов

### BEM-548.1 — Curator runtime intake hardening
Schema validation, duplicate trace_id protection, mandatory blocker format, source audit.
PASS: validation samples, report, transport records.

### BEM-548.2 — Role-orchestrator workflow parity
Перенести проверенную BEM-543 decision logic в постоянный contract/workflow parity без direct external dispatch.
PASS: workflow/contract routes curator_assignment -> analyst/auditor/executor/final audit/closure.

### BEM-548.3 — Provider probe integration
Интегрировать BEM-541 provider probe into provider-adapter workflow path.
PASS: provider_probe_result + provider_selection_decision + provider_selection_audit records.

### BEM-548.4 — Telegram delivery confirmation without waiting
Проверить outbox readiness. Не ждать hourly run.
PASS: ready_to_send/queued_for_sender record exists or exact blocker.

### BEM-548.5a — Synthetic regression
Все записи файловые, без live API.
PASS: external -> curator -> orchestrator -> provider probe -> roles -> telegram delivery synthetic -> final.

### BEM-548.5b — Live regression
Реальный live check: если Telegram sent уже есть — PASS; если нет — exact blocker without stopping other development.
PASS: `telegram_delivery_result.status=sent` or exact blocker `WAITING_FOR_HOURLY_LIVE_DELIVERY`.

### BEM-548.6 — Monitoring/state dashboard v2
Stable `contour_status.json` schema v2 for GPT/Claude/Telegram readers.
PASS: schema v2 with last run/provider/Telegram/blockers.
')

contour = {}
if state_path.exists():
    try:
        contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception:
        contour = {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:51 (UTC+3)'
contour['bem548'] = {'status':'APPROVED_BY_CLAUDE_WITH_EDITS','stages_total':7,'stages':['548.1','548.2','548.3','548.4','548.5a','548.5b','548.6'],'telegram_outbox_ready':outbox_ready,'outbox_matches':outbox_matches}
contour['bem546_technical_status'] = 'TECHNICALLY_COMPLETE_OUTBOX_READY' if outbox_ready else 'OUTBOX_NOT_READY'
contour['blocker'] = None if outbox_ready else {'code':'BEM546_OUTBOX_NOT_READY'}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')

record = {'record_type':'external_audit_approval','cycle_id':'bem548-claude-approval-sync','source':'claude_external_auditor','status':'completed','decision':'BEM-548 approved with edits','stages_total':7,'telegram_outbox_ready':outbox_ready,'outbox_matches':outbox_matches,'artifact_path':'governance/tasks/pending/BEM548_NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_FOR_APPROVAL.md','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None if outbox_ready else {'code':'BEM546_OUTBOX_NOT_READY'},'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:51 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')

report = reports/'bem548_0_claude_approval_sync.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-548.0 | Claude Approval Sync | PASS
